news.title: Atlanta man killed in SE Georgia shooting, GBI investigating
news.summary: A 36-year-old Atlanta man was killed in a Fourth of July shooting in southeast Georgia, and the investigation has been turned over to the Georgia Bureau of Investigation.

news.title: Person found shot to death near busy intersection in southeast Atlanta
Man found dead in street Tuesday morning, Atlanta PD investigating
news.summary: Atlanta police are investigating after a man was found dead in the street early Tuesday morning.

news.title: 16-year-old found dead days after being shot in Atlanta
news.summary: Police are investigating after a teenager was found dead several days after being shot.

news.title: Woman dies at hospital after shooting, Atlanta police investigating
news.summary: A shooting turned fatal after a wounded woman was driven to an Atlanta hospital in a private vehicle and died from their injuries, police said.

news.title: 1 dead after showing up to Grady with gunshot wound
news.summary: Atlanta police are investigating a deadly shooting on Monday night.

news.title: 1 dead in shooting at apartment complex in Atlanta's Browns Mill Park neighborhood, police say
news.summary: Investigators have not released the victim's identity or any information about a possible suspect.

news.title: Atlanta man killed in July 4 shooting in Vidalia, GBI says
news.summary: Officers with the Vidalia Police Department arrived to find the victim lying in the roadway.

news.title: Atlanta man sentenced to prison for federal mail fraud
news.summary: An Atlanta man will spend 14 years behind bars after using a fake federal agent persona to scam elderly investors out of nearly $1 million, federal prosecutors announced Monday.

news.title: 16-year-old found dead days after Fourth of July shooting, police say
news.summary: Atlanta Police said they believe the 16-year-old found dead is the third victim of a shooting where two others were injured.

news.title: 16-year-old found dead days after southwest Atlanta shooting
news.summary: A Fourth of July shooting has turned fatal after Atlanta investigators searching the scene discovered a deceased teenager two days later, authorities said.

news.title: Sandy Springs police arrest suspect disguised as delivery driver
news.summary: A man disguised as an Amazon delivery driver faces multiple charges after a vehicle owner caught him breaking into her car on a security camera feed, Sandy Springs police said.

news.title: DeKalb DA's Office employee critically injured by July 4th celebratory gunfire; two arrested
news.summary: The DeKalb County DA's Office said Lakesha Davis was inside her own home when she was critically injured by the gunfire.

news.title: Police working to identify suspect linked to armed robbery, carjacking in Atlanta
news.summary: ​When they met up, the suspect flashed his gun at the victim and took his vehicle, according to police.

news.title: 1 person arrested after gunfire interrupts fireworks celebration in Avondale Estates, police say
news.summary: Attendees at the celebration were evacuated out of an abundance of caution, according to police, and were quickly escorted from the stadium.
